case_title: JORGE ORTEGA SALAZAR VS. EDUARD MARCHESE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-17-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JORGE ORTEGA SALAZAR IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRERTER SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT EDUARD MARCHESE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, JORGE ORTEGA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARCHESE, EDUARD PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2022 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO NOV-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE FOR TODAY'S MATTER. PLAINTIFF JORGE ORTEGA SALAZAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDUARD MARCHESE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY USING GOOGLE TRANSLATE FOR ENGLISH TO SPANISH TRANSLATION WITH THE CLERK. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED AUG-01-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARCHESE, EDUARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2022 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO DEC-16-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER IS NOT AVAILABLE FOR TODAY'S MATTER. PLAINTIFF JORGE ORTEGA SALAZAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDUARD MARCHESE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY USING GOOGLE TRANSLATE FOR ENGLISH TO SPANISH TRANSLATION WITH THE CLERK. PLAINTIFF IS TOLD BY COURTROOM CLERK THAT HE CAN BRING SOMEONE WHO CAN HELP WITH TRANSLATION TO HELP TRANSLATE AT THE NEXT COURT DATE. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2023 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY SALAZAR, JORGE ORTEGA MARCHESE, EDUARD
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SALAZAR, JORGE ORTEGA MARCHESE, EDUARD
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,528.00 FILED BY SALAZAR, JORGE ORTEGA AS TO DEFENDANT MARCHESE, EDUARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF JORGE ORTEGA SALAZAR IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER COLETTE CRUTCHER WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. DEFENDANT EDUARD MARCHESE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
